name: codex-memory
description: Relay-backed durable memory workflows for Codex, including retrieval, injection, and timeline memory persistence.

interface.shortDescription: Retrieve, inject, and persist Relay timeline memories from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds a formal Codex plugin for Relay-backed durable memory workflows. The plugin can search stored timeline memories, build an injectable context block for the current task, and save a newly organized timeline memory into the shared SQLite memory store.
defaultPrompt: 检索一下这个主题相关的记忆
把和当前任务最相关的记忆注入上下文
把当前讨论保存成时间线记忆
